title: Village Guidance — The Capital
description: After the forest, Theron sends the party toward Scriptura, the capital.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: The corruption comes from the capital. You've seen the court magic. You know what that means.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: Scriptura is south. The road is long and the chancellor's influence grows stronger the closer you get. But you've earned the right to ask questions. Go ask them.
